technical.check: Zero CDN — no external font/css/image resources
All JS uses forEach(el => obs.observe(el)) pattern
Contact form contains only name/email/message fields
Navigation links are clickable and point to real pages (not #anchors)
Every page has unique <title>, <meta description>, and OG tags
All shared component styles are in design-tokens.css
Mobile responsive — no horizontal scroll at 375px

buyerPerspective.check: Homepage — Can buyer identify factory category + core capabilities in 10 seconds?
Capabilities — Are technical specs concrete (numbers, not adjectives)?
Site-wide — CTA button visible and reachable on every page?
Site-wide — Trust signals (certs/capacity data/process description) sufficient?
Site-wide — Do images fulfill communication roles (not purely decorative)?
Quote — Is the PCB estimation system functional with real options?
10-second scan — Can buyer answer 'what can this factory do' in 3 seconds?
10-second scan — Can buyer answer 'why choose them' in 3 seconds?
10-second scan — CTA action clear within 1 second?
